articles.title: Yahoo Finance
articles.content: Customers of MariBank may start investing in the fund from $1 from April 1, 2026. Launched in 1999, the fund invests primarily in equities listed on Singapore Exchange, including non-Straits Times Index (FTSE STI) component stocks, as well as selected overseas-listed equities with similar characteristics

articles.title: Fire breaks out at Bukit Merah View Hawker Centre; no injuries reported
articles.content: There were no reported injuries. The cause of the fire is under investigation. Stallholders are also advised to maintain the exhaust ducts at least once...

articles.title: 2 motorcyclists taken to hospital after accident in Pasir Ris
articles.content: In a dashcam video shared on Facebook, both motorcyclists can be seen approaching the junction from opposite directions before crashing into each other. Two male motorcyclists, aged 30 and 36, were taken conscious to Changi General Hospital.
